svg.title: CursorBuddy window with orbiting cursor
svg.desc: Window frame fills the square, small rounded cursor inside with a thin blue orbit path and buddy dot

g.text: window: full 180x180 tile, 22 rx corners, 7px stroke
title bar: horizontal line at 19% from top, single blue dot left-aligned
cursor: centered in content area, approximately 22% of tile width
orbit: single quadratic bezier from upper-left of cursor looping to lower-right
buddy dot: solid circle at orbit endpoint, same blue as title bar dot
